agent_features.name: Workload Protection (CWS)
agent_features.description: eBPF-based process, file, and network monitoring for runtime threat detection

agent_features.name: VM: Host SBOM
agent_features.description: Scans host OS packages for known vulnerabilities (CVEs)

agent_features.name: VM: Container Image SBOM
agent_features.description: Scans container images for packages and known vulnerabilities

agent_features.name: CSPM: Compliance Benchmarks
agent_features.description: CIS benchmark and host compliance checks for misconfiguration detection

tracer_features.name: AAP (App & API Protection)
tracer_features.description: In-App WAF for detecting injection attacks, account takeover, and application abuse

tracer_features.name: IAST
tracer_features.description: Source-to-sink taint tracking to find exploitable code paths in live traffic

tracer_features.name: SCA Runtime
tracer_features.description: Runtime detection of vulnerable third-party dependencies loaded by the application
